formula: ELF3 = prod(f(ELF4)) * prod(g(PHYB, GHD7)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
PRR37 = prod(f(Photoperiod_LD, PHYB, PHYC, GI, MA2_SMYD, ID1)) * prod(g(CCA1, ELF3, LUX)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
GHD7 = prod(f(Photoperiod_LD, PHYB, PHYC, ID1)) * prod(g(ELF3, LUX)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
CO = prod(f(GI, FKF1, MA2_SMYD, ID1, PRR37)) * prod(g(PHYB)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
EHD1 = prod(f(GI, ID1, CO)) * prod(g(PRR37, GHD7)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
FT1 = prod(f(CO, EHD1)) * prod(g(PHYB, PRR37, GHD7)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
FT8 = prod(f(ID1, CO, EHD1)) * prod(g(PRR37, GHD7, AP2)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
FT10 = prod(f(ID1, CO, EHD1)) * prod(g(PRR37, GHD7)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
GF14 = prod(f(FT1, FT8, FT10)) * 1.0 * gene_modifier + exogenous
SOC1 = prod(f(FT1, FT8, FT10, SBP4)) * 1.0 * gene_modifier + exogenous
AP1 = prod(f(SOC1, LFY, FD1)) * 1.0 * gene_modifier + exogenous
Flowering_Time = prod(f(FT12, AP2)) * prod(g(FT1, FT8, FT10, SOC1, AP1, GF14, Gibberellin, ID1)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
